info.title: MusicBrainz Web Service 2
info.description: OpenAPI 3.0 specification for the MusicBrainz Web Service 2 (ws/2) JSON interface. This specification focuses on the documented REST endpoints, common parameters, and representative response schemas for JSON usage.

get.description: If a `query` parameter is present, performs a search. If a browsing parameter such as `collection` is present, performs a browse.
If `query` is present, performs a search. If a browsing parameter such as `area`, `collection`, `recording`, `release`, `release-group`, or `work` is present, performs a browse.

parameters.name: area
parameters.description: Browse artists linked to an area

parameters.name: recording
parameters.description: Browse artists linked to a recording

parameters.name: release
parameters.description: Browse artists linked to a release

parameters.name: release-group
parameters.description: Browse artists linked to a release group

parameters.name: work
parameters.description: Browse artists linked to a work

parameters.name: artist
parameters.description: Browse events linked to an artist

get.description: Returns all genres in alphabetical order. Supports JSON, XML, or plain text via `fmt=txt`.

post.description: Submits ISRCs for recordings via XML body. JSON is not supported for submission; this is included for completeness.

parameters.name: track_artist
parameters.description: Browse releases where artist appears only on tracks

parameters.name: release-group
parameters.description: Browse releases in a release group

parameters.name: collection
parameters.description: Browse release groups in a collection

parameters.name: release
parameters.description: Browse release groups containing a release

parameters.name: release-group-status
parameters.description: Filter release groups by website-default or all

get.summary: Lookup URL entity by resource URL

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: URL to look up; may be specified multiple times

parameters.name: discid
parameters.description: Disc ID or '-' for TOC-only fuzzy lookup

parameters.name: toc
parameters.description: Table of contents for fuzzy lookup

parameters.name: cdstubs
parameters.description: Whether to include CD stubs (default yes)

parameters.name: media-format
parameters.description: Medium format filter for fuzzy TOC search

cdstub.description: CD stub if no releases found

parameters.name: releaseIds
parameters.description: Semicolon-separated list of release MBIDs (in URI path after /releases/)

parameters.name: releaseIds
parameters.description: Semicolon-separated list of release MBIDs (in URI path after /releases/)

post.summary: Submit user tags and genres (XML body)

Inc.name: inc

schema.description: Space- or plus-separated list of sub-queries and relationship includes

Inc.description: Include additional data such as recordings, releases, release-groups, works, relationships, tags, ratings, genres, etc.

Fmt.name: fmt
Fmt.description: Response format (defaults to XML; use json for JSON responses)

TypeFilter.name: type

schema.description: Release or release-group type filter; may be a pipe-separated list

TypeFilter.description: Filter by type (e.g. album, single, ep, live, compilation, etc.)

StatusFilter.name: status
StatusFilter.description: Filter releases by status (official, promotion, bootleg, pseudo-release, withdrawn, cancelled)

Client.name: client
Client.description: Client identifier in the form application-version for data submission
